description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring a mix of light brown and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent garage with a dark door, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. Large windows are distributed across both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary appearance. The backyard area includes a swimming pool, a patio with outdoor furniture, and additional landscaping, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The house is surrounded by a paved walkway and is set within a rectangular lot. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and large windows facing the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional landscaping, with less emphasis on the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
